intended_use_full: MEDIP PRO is intended for use as a software interface and image segmentation system for the transfer of DICOM imaging information from a medical scanner to an output file. It is also used as pre-operative software for treatment planning. The 3D printed models generated from the output file are meant for non-diagnostic use. MEDIP PRO should be used in conjunction with other diagnostic tools and expert clinical judgement.
